name: Descent Braking
summary: Reducing speed before gravity gains control on a downhill.

name: Engine Braking
summary: Using a lower gear to help control speed on a slope.

name: Hairpin Turn
summary: A very tight curve that requires a slow, clean entry.

name: Camber Grip
summary: How the tilt of the road can help or hurt traction in a curve.

name: Following Gap
summary: The buffer kept behind another vehicle when braking distance changes.

name: Shoulder Space
summary: The edge space that may be used only with caution and purpose.

name: Runoff Lane
summary: A recovery lane or escape area for losing control on a slope.

name: Fog Line
summary: The lane-edge marking that helps you keep orientation in haze.

name: Gravel Traction
summary: The reduced grip you get on loose stone or dirt at the edge.

name: Grade Awareness
summary: Noticing how steepness changes your speed and stopping needs.

name: Guardrail Zone
summary: A protected edge that still demands careful lane discipline.

name: Apex Control
summary: Choosing the safest point in a curve rather than attacking it.
